narrative:
Precinct Adams East & Bradford (precinct in Darke County) has 925 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.5 percentage points.
